description: A square graphic built on a selfie-style photograph of an adult man with dark hair and a thin mustache, reclining inside a vehicle and looking toward the camera, with autumn trees visible through a window. A red banner across the lower portion reads WORST OF THE WORST in white capitals, with a small U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal and wordmark centered below.
notable_text: WORST OF THE WORST; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
